scripts.build: yarn typecheck && yarn workspace sveltinia build && yarn docs:build
scripts.publish:dry: yarn build && npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org --dry-run
scripts.publish:npm: yarn build && npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org
scripts.release:minor: cd packages/sveltinia && npm version minor && cd ../.. && yarn build && npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: cd packages/sveltinia && npm version major && cd ../.. && yarn build && npm publish ./packages/sveltinia --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org && git push && git push --tags
